summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Faculty CRM theme toggle functionality. All core theme features working correctly - dark/light mode switching, persistence, and UI rendering across all pages.

minor_bugs.issue: Rate limiting error - user already played maximum allowed
Binary file encoding issues in test suite
minor_bugs.impact: Test framework issue, not application bug

passed_tests: Dark mode default rendering on login page and all admin pages
Light mode rendering on all pages after toggle
Theme persistence via localStorage with key 'faculty_theme'
Theme toggle works across different pages (Dashboard, Leads, etc)
All navigation items working in both themes
Dashboard page statistics and charts render correctly
Leads page CRUD operations work in both themes
Add lead form dialog opens/closes properly
All admin pages (Games, Loyalty, Chat IA, Quotations, Bulk, Products) load correctly
Game public page (/game/roulette) renders in correct theme
Backend API authentication and core endpoints (94.7% success rate)
Theme state consistency between localStorage and DOM classes
